name: The Quickwood Eaves
descriptionSeed: Where the grown city thins into ordinary forest and ordinary forest thins into the Deepwood. The Eaves are the Rootkin's front door and they have deliberately not marked it — you know you have arrived when the trees start being interested in you.
encounterFlavor: Eave-wardens who were watching you long before you saw them; Deepwood things that come to the edge and no further; travelers who cannot tell where the wild ends and the city begins.
questSeeds: Something has come out of the Deepwood into the Eaves and the wardens have not reported it
A traveler entered the Eaves a month ago and the trees will not say where they went
